name: Resume/CV Parser
description: Extract structured data from unstructured PDF or DOCX resumes using advanced AI. Automatically parses names, contact info, work experience, education, and skills into clean JSON.
shortDesc: Extract structured data from PDF/DOCX resumes instantly

params.name: file_url
params.desc: URL of the PDF or DOCX file (or use base64 in 'file_base64')

howItWorks: Provide a URL to a PDF or DOCX resume
Our OCR engine extracts all raw text and layout metadata
A fine-tuned NLP model identifies entities (names, dates, companies, skills)
The unstructured text is mapped to a strict, standardized JSON schema
You receive the structured data ready for your database
